title: AI Writing Tool ROI Calculator
description: Estimate whether an AI writing tool saves more money than it costs for your monthly content workflow.
metaDescription: Estimate monthly savings and break-even for AI writing tools using your own team data.

faq.q: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.a: It is a planning tool based on your inputs. Use conservative, base, and aggressive scenarios before deciding.

faq.q: Should I use annual pricing in this model?
faq.a: Start with monthly cost assumptions first, then compare annual plans after validating usage.

useCase: General-purpose calculator for evaluating whether writing tool subscriptions are worth it.
watchouts: Overestimated time savings is the most common modeling mistake.
reco: Start conservative, then update with real pilot data in 2 weeks.

title: ChatGPT Team Cost Calculator
description: Calculate total ChatGPT team cost and compare it against expected time savings from faster drafting and research.
metaDescription: Calculate ChatGPT team cost, expected time savings, and practical ROI scenarios.

faq.q: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.a: It is a planning tool based on your inputs. Use conservative, base, and aggressive scenarios before deciding.

faq.q: Should I use annual pricing in this model?
faq.a: Start with monthly cost assumptions first, then compare annual plans after validating usage.

useCase: Best for teams using AI for drafting, summarization, and research support across multiple departments.
watchouts: Token usage can spike costs if usage rules are unbounded. Set clear team usage guidelines.
reco: Great fit when your team uses it daily for repeat tasks. Pilot with clear workflow SOPs.
